sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ طَاوِلَةً فِي الْمَطْعَمِ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je pronašla sto u restoranu kraj prozora.
sentences.translationEn: The family found a table in the restaurant by the window.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الطِّفْلُ الْبِيتْزَا وَطَلَبَ الْوَالِدَانِ السَّلَطَةَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je naručilo pizzu a roditelji salatu.
sentences.translationEn: The child ordered pizza and the parents ordered salad.

sentences.translation: Malo su čekali i razgovarali za vrijeme čekanja.
sentences.translationEn: They waited a little and talked while waiting.

sentences.translation: Stigla je hrana i jeli su sretni.
sentences.translationEn: The food came and they ate happily.
